title: vernonanthura puberula
intro: Vernonanthura puberula, also known as the puberula shrub or silver mist bush, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family that is native to tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. Its health benefits include the potential to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or salves, and its essential oils can be extracted for various applications.
